title: Delicate Norwegian Salmon Skewers
description: A peppery and crunchy Norwegian dish featuring Thai chilli jam, perfect for a date night, and friendly to sugar-free diets. This recipe uses sous-vide cooking for a delicate finish.
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 120 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the salmon fillets into 1-inch pieces and season with black pepper, lemon zest, and garlic powder.
Thread the salmon pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers into a single layer in the sous-vide machine and cook for 10 minutes.
While the salmon is cooking, heat the coconut oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Thai chilli jam to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Once the salmon is cooked, remove it from the sous-vide machine and brush with the chilli jam mixture.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
